title: Strengths And Weaknesses In Current Dry Bulk Market
section_path: Strengths And Weaknesses In Current Dry Bulk Market
section_path_text: Strengths And Weaknesses In Current Dry Bulk Market
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Overall dry bulk rates increased last week. The jump in capesize rates has dominated many headlines -- but as we stressed in Commodore Research's Weekly Executive Report this week, the rebound in panamax rates is significant too. Prior to last week, the last time that panamax rates had risen by just 1% or more was back in April.
